our_story_intro: Across cultures and centuries, there are tales of souls destined to find one another—bound by forces greater than time or distance.
our_story_legends: In Japanese legend, the Aka Ito (赤い糸), the "Red Thread of Fate," ties two hearts meant to be together—an unbreakable bond that may tangle or stretch, but never breaks. In Arabic tradition, Maktub (مكتوب)—"it is written"—whispers that love is etched in the stars long before two paths cross. And in French, the words âmes sœurs, or soulmates, speak of kindred spirits, souls who recognize one another as if meeting again after lifetimes apart.
our_story_meeting: Ours is a story woven from such magic: a serendipitous encounter in [YEAR_MET] between a woman from [ORIGIN_1] and a man from [ORIGIN_2]. Against all odds, their worlds collided in [CITY_MET]—the City of Love—where fate, or perhaps something written long ago, brought them together.
our_story_invitation: Come and join us as we celebrate this beautiful union and the beginning of a new chapter of our lives.
quote_lebanese: You are the olive oil to my zaatar.
quote_french: You are the bread to my camembert.
schedule_ceremony_desc: Join us for our civil marriage at [CEREMONY_VENUE].
schedule_cocktail_desc: Enjoy drinks and appetizers while we take photos.
schedule_reception_desc: Dinner, dancing, and celebration into the night.
schedule_day2_event_desc: The party is not over! Join us for a Lebanese brunch.
travel_intro: You can easily reach the area by train from Paris or Rouen:

travel_station_lehavre_desc: , which is closer to the dinner ([RECEPTION_VENUE]).
travel_taxi_info: From either station, taxis are available (we recommend booking in advance):
travel_car_flexibility: If you would like more flexibility, cars can be rented at
travel_note: Note: The wedding will take place in two nearby locations (ceremony + reception). Let us know if you don't have a car — we'll be happy to arrange a ride with other guests or organize transport.
accommodation_intro_text: Here are a few hotels located close to
accommodation_hotel3: B&B HOTEL Le Havre Centre Gare
accommodation_note: If you don't have a car, don't worry, we'll make sure you can get back to the hotel at night.
rsvp_intro: Please let us know if you can join us by [RSVP_DEADLINE]
rsvp_success_yes: Thank you for your RSVP. We look forward to celebrating with you!
rsvp_success_no: Thank you for letting us know. We will miss you!
rsvp_backup_text: If the form above doesn't work, you can also
rsvp_backup_link: fill out the form directly on Google Forms
wedding_list_intro: Your presence is truly the most precious gift you could give us 💛
wedding_list_honeymoon_text: But if you'd like to add a cherry on top and help us create new adventures together, you can contribute to our honeymoon trip to [HONEYMOON_DESTINATION] (via bank transfer or directly at the reception).
wedding_list_bank_text: You can make a transfer to our joint account. Banking details will be provided upon request.
wedding_list_cash_text: An envelope can also be dropped off at the reception.
wedding_list_thanks: Thank you from the bottom of our hearts for your generosity and for sharing this special day with us!
footer_text: We can't wait to celebrate with you!
